hero.badge: AI Editing Assistant for Final Cut Pro
hero.title: Your editing style,
hero.description: Just upload your video. AI analyzes your editing style and auto-generates silence cuts, subtitles, and chapters. Export Final Cut Pro FCPXML in one click.

features.title: What EditClone can do
features.subtitle: AI automates tedious editing work so you can focus on creativity.

silence.title: Auto Silence Cutting
silence.description: Detects silences and pauses, reflects cut candidates in FCPXML automatically.

transcript.title: Whisper Transcription
transcript.description: High-accuracy transcription with OpenAI's Whisper. SRT subtitle files generated automatically.

chapters.title: YouTube Chapter Generation
chapters.description: Auto-generates chapters from speech content. Paste directly into YouTube descriptions.

fcpxml.title: FCPXML Export
fcpxml.description: Generate Final Cut Pro project files with one click. Start editing immediately.

srt.title: Subtitle File (SRT)
srt.description: Generates SRT subtitle files compatible with YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram.

async.title: Background Processing
async.description: Long videos processed asynchronously. Close your browser after upload—processing continues.

upload.title: Upload Your Video
upload.description: Supports MP4, MOV, M4V formats. Simple drag and drop upload.

analyze.title: AI Analyzes Automatically
analyze.description: Whisper transcribes, ffmpeg detects silence, AI generates chapters.

download.title: Download as ZIP
download.description: Get FCPXML, SRT, and chapter text bundled together. Ready for Final Cut Pro.

cta.title: Start Editing Smarter Today
cta.description: Free to sign up. No credit card required. Ready in 1 minute.

footer.tagline: AI Editing Assistant for Final Cut Pro

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Start automating your video editing
signup.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Upload a video to start auto-editing
dashboard.noVideosSub: Upload a video to get started

results.title: Processing Complete
results.subtitle: Your files are ready to download

fcpxml.description: Project file for Final Cut Pro
